title: Interior Designer
description:
Job Title

Interior Designer

About Studioshen

Studioshen is an architecture and design practice focused on climate performance, spatial efficiency, construction logic, and financial accountability. Our interior work is fully integrated with architecture — driven by spatial clarity, material logic, and buildability rather than decoration.

We are looking for an Interior Designer who can both design rigorously and manage clients confidently.

Role Overview

You will lead and deliver interior design scopes across residential and selected commercial projects — from concept through construction.

This role requires someone who can:

  • Think and articulate design clearly

  • Translate concepts into buildable interiors

  • Manage clients professionally and decisively

  • Control quality, budgets, and timelines

You are not just producing drawings.
You are owning the interior design experience end-to-end.

Key Responsibilities

Interior Design Development

  • Develop interior concepts, layouts, and material strategies

  • Produce design presentations, mood boards, and spatial studies

  • Translate design intent into detailed drawings and specifications

  • Ensure interiors align with architectural logic and construction realities

Technical & Documentation

  • Prepare interior layout plans, elevations, details, and schedules

  • Coordinate with architects, consultants, suppliers, and contractors

  • Resolve detailing and constructability issues proactively

  • Oversee material selections, finishes, and FF&E integration

Client Management

  • Lead client meetings and design discussions confidently

  • Clearly explain design intent, options, and trade-offs

  • Manage expectations on scope, budget, and timelines

  • Handle feedback professionally while protecting design quality

Project & Site Involvement

  • Support tender documentation and contractor coordination

  • Attend site meetings and inspections as required

  • Review shop drawings and samples

  • Ensure design intent is delivered on site

Requirements

Essential

  • Diploma or Degree in Interior Design (or equivalent)

  • Strong design thinking and spatial planning ability

  • Excellent verbal communication — able to present and defend design clearly

  • Proven client-facing experience

  • Strong technical drawing and documentation skills

  • Proficiency in Revit (or equivalent BIM workflow)

  • Organised, accountable, and able to manage multiple projects

Preferred

  • 3+ years of relevant interior design experience

  • Experience in residential projects (Singapore preferred)

  • Familiarity with local construction practices and suppliers

  • Strong material knowledge and detailing sensibility

  • Ability to work seamlessly with architectural teams

What We Offer

  • Ownership of real interior design projects

  • Direct client exposure and leadership responsibility

  • Integrated architecture + interior design environment

  • High design and technical standards

  • Competitive salary based on capability and performance

postedCompany.description:
Studioshen is a dynamic and innovative architectural practice with a focus on

strategic design thinking. We believe that a careful creative process during the

conception of any project can unlock potential solutions for a better architectural

result.
postedCompany.name: STUDIOSHEN
